expectations.text: Does not use Inter, Roboto, Arial, or system-ui as the primary display font — chooses a distinctive alternative
expectations.evidence: Display font is "Instrument Serif" from Google Fonts. Body font is "General Sans" (with system-ui only as a fallback, not primary). Neither Inter, Roboto, nor Arial appear anywhere in the output.

expectations.text: Uses rich dark backgrounds (not pure #000000) with tinted or warm undertones
expectations.evidence: Primary background is #0F0E0C ("Deep warm charcoal"), secondary is #1A1816, tertiary is #242220. Explicitly states "No pure black -- all backgrounds use a deep warm charcoal" and rationale: "Pure black feels harsh and digital. The warm undertone adds sophistication."

expectations.text: Defines a color system using CSS custom properties or Tailwind theme extension for consistency
expectations.evidence: Defines both CSS custom properties (:root with --bg-primary, --text-primary, --accent, etc.) and a full Tailwind theme extension in tailwind.config.js under colors.meridian with named tokens (bg, surface, elevated, text, muted, faint, accent, accent-hover, accent-subtle, border, border-hover).

expectations.text: Includes scroll-triggered or staggered entrance animations with CSS or a motion library
expectations.evidence: Implements a useScrollReveal hook using IntersectionObserver for scroll-triggered reveals. Hero has staggered word-by-word entrance (120ms delay per word). Features, ProductShowcase, CTA sections all use scroll-triggered fade-up animations with translateY(60px) transitions. Logo ticker uses infinite CSS animation (animate-logo-scroll).

expectations.text: Includes a prefers-reduced-motion media query or check to disable animations for accessibility
expectations.evidence: Two layers of reduced-motion support: (1) CSS media query in index.css: "@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { *, *::before, *::after { animation-duration: 0.01ms !important; ... } }" (2) JavaScript check in useScrollReveal hook: "window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches" which immediately sets isVisible=true, skipping all animation.

expectations.text: Attempts to open the result in a browser (Chrome extension, Playwright MCP, or mentions the need to verify visually)
expectations.evidence: Dedicates an entire "Phase 3: Visual Verification Loop" section. Checks for Chrome Extension (mcp__claude_in_chrome__*), Playwright MCP (mcp__playwright__*), and Playwright CLI tools. Provides detailed 5-round incremental verification workflow with Playwright test code for screenshots, scroll testing, responsive checks at 375px/768px/1440px, and accessibility tree snapshots. Notes that no browser MCP tools are available and recommends installation.

expectations.text: The overall aesthetic direction is clearly editorial/premium — not a generic tech startup template
expectations.evidence: Explicitly targets "Luxury editorial. Think Monocle magazine meets a Swiss design monograph." Uses copper accent (#C8956A) instead of tech-blue, asymmetric 7/12 hero layout, noise texture overlay, text-based logo ticker in serif font, edge-to-edge product screenshots with gradient fades, no gradient blobs or floating dashboard mockups. Summary table explicitly documents anti-generic decisions.
